description: Unified Tabula Sapiens — single classifier trained on the union of TS Blood / TS Lung / TS multi-tissue (62 Cell Ontology canonical cell types). 153K cells across multiple donors. Cross-tissue biology pooled into one model rather than separate per-atlas references.
classes: CD8-positive, alpha-beta cytokine secreting effector T cell
naive thymus-derived CD4-positive, alpha-beta T cell
serous cell of epithelium of bronchus
